properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v6 v5 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Miracles when You move Such an easy thing for You to do Your hand is moving right now You are still showing up At the tomb of every Lazarus Your voice is calling me out

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Right now, I know You're able My God, come through again

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You can do all things You can do all things but fail 'Cause You've never lost a battle No, You've never lost a battle And I know, I know You never will

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Everything's possible By the power of the Holy Ghost A new wind is blowing right now Breaking my heart of stone Taking over like it's Jericho And my walls are all crashing down

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You've never lost a battle You've never lost a battle You've never lost a battle You never will

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And I know, I know You never will

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And I know You won't lose And I know You won't lose And I know You won't lose You never will
